◎简　　介  

　　In this classic Thai thriller Operation Revenge, an ex-cop goes rogue and sets out to hunt down a ruthless drug cartel, even though it goes against his professional conduct. Meanwhile, the beautiful daughter of the ringleader who was killed in an internal feud has returned to Thailand from Hong Kong to take revenge on her father.
